production.playableLoop: Pilot a small tug around a twilight harbor, collect five glowing distress buoys, avoid moving whirlpools, and deliver the recovered buoys to the lighthouse dock before the storm timer expires.
production.objective: Recover Buoys 5/5 at the lighthouse dock before Storm reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Touching a whirlpool or timing out enters failed state; Space resets the rescue.

catalogSearches: tn asset source search --game-category boats --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category nautical --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH

tn asset source search --file-role model --json -> reviewed fallback list, no coherent direct harbor tug kit selected
assetProvenance.curatedFallback: docs/workflows/open-source-3d-asset-kits.md recommends Kenney Watercraft/Pirate Kit and Quaternius Ships Pack for naval/boats. The automation catalog did not expose a suitable direct GLB for this slice, so the game uses an authored low-poly harbor kit.

selected.conversionNotes: No third-party model downloaded. Tug, buoys, whirlpools, lighthouse, dock, breakwater, rocks, water lanes, and HUD are authored as structured-source primitive compositions with material intent.
